headline: Audit Defense for Credit Claims Preparation Checklist — New York
articleBody:
Audit Defense for Credit Claims Preparation Checklist for New York Clients

Before your Audit Defense for Credit Claims appointment with Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
